lines.speaker: Sailor
lines.text: Sorry, but I'm busy right now.

lines.speaker: Sailor
lines.text: Okay, but it will be better once we're back on board.

lines.speaker: Sailor
lines.text: Not too bad, but there's still a lot that needs doing today.

lines.speaker: Sailor
lines.text: Sorry, but I have lots of work to do before we head back out to sea.

lines.speaker: Sailor
lines.text: Well I could do with a good rest, but fine otherwise.
